title: A Pit in Spain Holds the Key to a Neanderthal DNA Mystery - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich on a podcast episode about Neanderthal DNA discoveries found in a Spanish archaeological site. The episode appears to explore mysteries and findings related to ancient human genomics.
